text: The competitive payments landscape saw notable regulatory developments on November 12, 2025, as Visa and Mastercard proposed a settlement in their long-running legal dispute with merchants over interchange fees, which could potentially impact rewards credit card dynamics across the industry. Meanwhile, Visa announced a stablecoin pilot program enabling instant crypto payouts via Visa Direct, marking increased competition in blockchain-powered payments. These developments suggest evolving competitive pressures in the global payments industry that may influence network positioning.
